{{Quote|Moff Toggan is onto me. Somehow he found out that I'm the one who's been slicing into his systems.|[[Rafe Ballon]], to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="Constant Spirit (short story)">{{InsiderCite|145|Constant Spirit (short story)}}</ref>}}
'''Toggan''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] and the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Quellor/Legends|Quellor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Moff Toggan tried to keep a tight reign over the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Legion/Legends|legion]] under his command, especially at the anti-Imperial rallies held on Quellor. During one such rally, in [[Terrina Square]], Moff Toggan specifically ordered his troops not to open fire on the protesters. However, when the protesters [[Fire/Legends|burned]] an effigy of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the stormtroopers [[Massacre at Terrina Square|opened fire]], shooting down every member of the peaceful protest.
